chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 202 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.825/2024 2. For order on CMA No.826/2024 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For order on CMA No.827/2024 (stay) 27.01.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for applicant This matter has been pending since 2024 without any progress, even notice has not been sought. On 07.05.2024, the following order was passed:- “Counsel for the applicant is directed to come prepared and satisfy as to how any Question of law is arising out of the order of the Tribunal as apparently, the Tribunal has determined the facts finally as to the discharge of burden by the Respondent”. On 19.08.2024, the following order was passed:- “Counsel for the applicant has been confronted as to the order passed on 07.05.2024 and he requests for further time to seek appropriate instructions. Adjourned to a date in office.” Today, learned counsel is again unable to assist the Court and merely seeks time. This matter has clogged the docket since 2024 and there is no apparent reason to perpetuate the same. Accordingly, in view of the above, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ashraf
